title: AgentTaskEvent
description: Nostr event schema for agent task marketplace (NIP-01 compatible)

content_example.task_description: Build a REST API for user authentication with JWT tokens
content_example.criteria: Must include: signup, login, logout endpoints. Password hashing with bcrypt. JWT token management. Unit tests with >90% coverage. TypeScript/Node.js.

action_event_description: Generic signed action relayed through msig. Used for fund_escrow, cancel_escrow, register_token, rotate_key, withdraw.
